curatorNote:
Lights is a collection of 1/1 real-time animations running on a custom smart contract written for on-chain artworks, through which the code can be delivered without any third party server involvement.

Hivemind holds Raster und Spektrum; a unique, deterministic, fully on-chain real-time animation, written in WebGL2 and JavaScript with no external dependencies. It was unveiled at Art Basel Miami 2025.
